calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Dismiss Claims For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Sep-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS JANSSEN PHARMACEUTICALS, INC., JANSSEN RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT, LLC AND JOHNSON & JOHNSON'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Dismiss Claims For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction is Off calendar. The case was dismissed on July 28, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)
